ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_estimations" (
  "estimation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimation record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated region */,
  "estimate" TEXT /* Estimated new confirmed cases along with the range */,
  "median" INTEGER /* Median of new confirmed cases */,
  "mean" INTEGER /* Mean of new confirmed cases */,
  "sd" INTEGER /* Standard deviation of new cases */,
  "lower_90" INTEGER /* Lower bound for the 90% confidence interval */,
  "lower_50" INTEGER /* Lower bound for the 50% confidence interval */,
  "lower_20" INTEGER /* Lower bound for the 20% confidence interval */,
  "upper_20" INTEGER /* Upper bound for the 20% confidence interval */,
  "upper_50" INTEGER /* Upper bound for the 50% confidence interval */,
  "upper_90" INTEGER /* Upper bound for the 90% confidence interval */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric description */,
  "expected_change" TEXT /* Expected change in daily cases */,
  "prob_control" REAL /* Probability of controlling the outbreak */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was made */,
  "infection_date" TEXT /* Infection date for the estimated cases */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the estimation (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_estimations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability entry */,
  "probability_value" REAL /* Probability value indicating control likelihood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control context */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the probability */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used to calculate the probability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_probabilities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* New cases reported on the date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative total cases reported to date */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Test positivity rate for the region on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, public health official) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account ( hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert threshold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated region */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for triggering alerts */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be displayed when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., case count, test positivity rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_estimation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "estimation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated estimation record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the estimation */,
  "estimate" TEXT /* Estimated new confirmed cases along with the range */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the estimation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_estimation_history_estimation_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimation_id") REFERENCES case_estimations ("estimation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_metrics" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated region */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the region */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)
